title: How to get a police certificate – Singapore - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – Singapore
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Certificate of Clearance (COC)

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.
We will send you a letter requesting a police certificate after you send us your application if a COC is required.
You must include that letter and submit your application online to the Criminal Investigation Department of the Singapore Police Force .
The Singapore Police Force will send your police clearance certificate directly to the IRCC office at the Consulate General of Canada.
All applications and payments for a COC are to be made online. The COC office does not accept walk-in applications.
Telephone: (+65) 64358277
Email: SPF_CID_COC@spf.gov.sg
